description_long: This is a modern, single-seat chaise with a deep, boxy silhouette and a low profile, upholstered in a dark, smooth material that appears to be leather or faux leather. The backrest and armrests are integrated into a continuous, gently curved form that envelops the seat, providing a sense of enclosure and comfort. The seat cushion is thick and plush, with subtle contouring for ergonomic support, while the back and side cushions are slightly angled for relaxed lounging. The chaise stands on four short, straight legs made of dark metal, giving it a sturdy yet minimalist appearance. The upholstery is solid in color, with no visible patterns or tufting, contributing to its sleek, contemporary aesthetic. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, lobbies, or upscale public seating areas.
description: A modern, boxy chaise with smooth dark upholstery, integrated armrests and backrest, and short metal legs. Its sleek, minimalist design offers plush comfort and a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, inviting seat, integrated armrests, and the enveloping backrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat and the continuous curve of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, unadorned backrest and the symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the chaise's overall depth.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently curved, and seamlessly integrated with the armrests, forming a continuous, enveloping structure. It is solid and unsegmented, with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, matching the height and curvature of the backrest, and are fully integrated into the overall form.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and cylindrical, made of dark metal with a matte finish, and are positioned at each corner for stability. They have a minimalist, functional design with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick seat cushion that is integrated into the base, with the back and side cushioning forming part of the continuous upholstered structure. No loose or additional cushions are visible.
